what_it_does: Records ledger metadata for a source image asset (pitch-deck/p-13.jpg) in the design-source channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id, address, channel, path, blob URI, mime type, name, and dimensions
standouts: Width and height are 0 for an image record
Blob reference includes a content hash
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter followed by a short markdown body
Follows a ledger-style id/address/path triplet for an asset
References binary content via a blob:// URI
Names the file with a channel-prefixed, double-underscore-separated pattern
concerns: Image dimensions are recorded as 0, suggesting missing or unextracted metadata
No descriptive text, alt text, or content summary for the image
No links to related pitch-deck pages or sibling assets
notes: A ledger stub for a pitch-deck source image that carries provenance and a blob reference but lacks dimensions and relationships.
questions: Why are the width and height 0 instead of the actual image dimensions?
What visual content appears on pitch-deck page 13?
Are there related pitch-deck pages that should be linked?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to record a design ground-truth source image; actual content is a metadata stub with missing dimensions and no descriptive content, so it only partially fulfills that purpose.
intention_signals: To register a pitch-deck image as a stable, ground-truth design-source asset that can be referenced by other parts of the system.
contribution: Provides a stable identifier, addressable URI, blob reference, and source-provenance label for a pitch-deck image asset.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata record for pitch-deck page 13 image in the design-source channel, including a blob reference, zero dimensions, and a source ground-truth label.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog a pitch-deck source image as a design ground-truth asset for the project ledger.
